_comment: Rebindable order-mode hotkeys + keybindings menu (#87). This is a ☰ Menu → Keybindings… settings dialog, which the headless demo runner can't open, so the feature itself is NOT visible in this clip. Reuses the bundled showcase battle so CI still posts a build demo; the change is pure client-side input config with no in-battle visual and no sim/replay impact.
caption: Rebindable order-mode hotkeys (#87): the H/F/R/K/G order-mode keys can now be remapped from ☰ Menu → Keybindings… (capture a key, conflicts rejected, reset-to-defaults), persisted in user://settings.cfg; the selector reads its keys from Settings. NOTE: it's a settings dialog this silent auto-clip can't open — the clip is just the bundled showcase battle. Pure input config: no sim/replay/determinism impact.
